purpose: Reconcile a POSITIVE FMScope cohort-conditioned erasure result with the strict source-only TOS deployment result by running BOTH protocols on the SAME frozen features, as a 2x2 design (only the eraser-fit population differs; the task probe is identical).

rows_fit_regime.ORACLE_GLOBAL_GEOMETRY: fit LEACE on the WHOLE cohort's frozen features + subject ids INCLUDING the outer test subject, NO task labels; subject-disjoint task probe. ORACLE DIAGNOSTIC -- never DG, never deployable.
rows_fit_regime.strict_source_only: fit LEACE on SOURCE subjects only; train head on SOURCE only; score TARGET only at the end (the deployable DG contract).

cols_removal.subject_leace: LEACE removes the linear subject-identity concept
cols_removal.random_rank: remove the SAME rank k in the SAME whitened geometry, averaged over >= n_random draws

leace_variants: ledoit_wolf (LW-whitened LEACE; rules out implementation-only conditioning explanation)
paired_cluster_CIs: C_vs_full  (global random-rank vs full; conditioning control)
lw_vs_empirical (Ledoit-Wolf LEACE vs current LEACE, per cell A and B)

interpretation_verdict_contract.frozen_fm_pos & task_trained_null: representation_geometry_difference (requires a 2nd, task-trained feature set; not evaluated with a single frozen feature set)
interpretation_verdict_contract.positive_def: paired delta balanced-accuracy 95% fold-cluster CI lower bound > 0
interpretation_verdict_contract.rule: The ORACLE (global) mode is NEVER labelled DG.

firewall: source_only_fit(Zs, ys, subj_s, whiten) takes NO target argument; source-only eraser + head are provably a function of source rows; target enters ONLY the final _task_metrics scoring. Enforced by tests test_firewall_*.
status: CODE_FROZEN; PENDING_FROZEN_DUMPS. Real per-fold frozen .npz dumps are pruned from the repo (only erasure_report.json summaries are committed). NO real bridge numbers are reported here -- do not infer any. Validated end-to-end on SYNTHETIC gaussian dumps only (9/9 tests pass).

step_1_regenerate_dumps_GPU: python -m tos_cmi.run_eeg_frozen_pilot --dataset BNCI2014_001 --backbone EEGNet --target-subjects all --configs erm:0 --seed 0 --device cuda --out-root tos_cmi/results/tos_cmi_eeg_frozen
python -m tos_cmi.run_eeg_frozen_pilot --dataset BNCI2014_001 --backbone TSMNet --target-subjects all --configs erm:0 --seed 0 --device cuda --out-root tos_cmi/results/tos_cmi_eeg_frozen
(repeat with --seed 1 --seed 2 for multi-seed fold-cluster CIs; each writes <DATASET>_<BACKBONE>_LOSO/sub<tgt>_erm_lam0_seed<seed>.npz)

synthetic_smoke_run.output_dir: results/cmi_trace_p0p1/fmscope_bridge/synthetic/ (gitignored; tagged data_source=SYNTHETIC_SMOKE; NOT a scientific result)
